Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Releif From Breach Of
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Continued To Oct-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Levy appearing for Mark Epstein. Stipulation reached. Mr. Epstein will resigned. Mr. Bluestone will be appointed. Court still need a consent from Mr. Bluestone. Amount of bond or waiver of bond from all. Notice was not sent to Franchise Tax Board. Either to send notice to FTB or to obtain a waiver of special notice from them. Counsel will sent notice for the accounting and agreement to appoint a successor trustee. Matter is continued to 10/15. Accounting petition set on 9/10 is also continued to 10/15.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Releif From Breach Of

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Releif From Breach Of
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Continued To Aug-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Releif From Breach Of
Off Calendar Jun-11-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Carmen Sinigiani appearing for petitioner. Ms. Procsal is in court. Peter Levy appearing for co-trustee. Mr. Levy raised the standing issue. Court is granting the petitions for appointment of guardian ad litem. Orders signed. The Court instructed the Guardian Ad Litem to file an amendment to substitute her in as the petitioner in place of the two original petitioners. The accounting filed by the trustees did not have a petition for approval. Court instructed Mr. Levy to file the accounting with a petition to approve the accounting and to have it set for hearing. Ms. Sinigiani argued that the petition for removal should go forward today. Court felt that will require an evidentiary hearing. Ms. Sinigiani can file an exparte petition for suspension of powers. Matter is continued to 7/30. The accounting petition can be set for hearing on 7/30 with 30 days notice.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Arias.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, For Releif From Breach Of
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Continued To Jun-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peter Levy appearing for trustee Mark Epstein. Carmen Dinigiani and Bradford DeMeo appearing for petitioners. Laurie Procsal is in court. Mr. Levy stated the trustee wants to stay in to complete the accounting and prepare the tax returns. The Retirement accounts are not trust assets. Susan Epstein is the named beneficiary and she is out of the country until mid to end of May. Court questioned the natural parents's standing. Counsel argued that the natural parents has the authority to act for their childern. They want to have the trustee removed. They have many questions with the accounting that was provided. Court wants parties to get together to work it out and to get guardian ad litem appointed for the minors. Matter is continued to 6/11.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Ofril.
